description_long: This skateboard features a classic, elongated deck with a matte black finish and rounded ends, supported by four red wheels attached to metal trucks. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, providing both strength and flexibility, while the top surface is covered with a solid black grip tape for traction. The wheels are small and hard, suitable for street or park skating, and are mounted on standard trucks that are partially visible beneath the deck. There are no visible graphics, logos, or decorative elements on the deck, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The hardware, such as bolts and nuts, is subtly visible on the top of the deck, indicating secure assembly. The overall design is streamlined and functional, ideal for urban environments like sidewalks, skate parks, or garages.
description: A minimalist black skateboard with a plain deck, red wheels, and standard metal trucks, designed for urban skating. The deck is covered with solid black grip tape and lacks any visible graphics or branding.
description_view_0: Side perspective showing the full length of the black deck and all four red wheels, with the trucks partially visible underneath.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the solid black grip tape and the rounded nose and tail of the deck, with two red wheels barely visible at the ends.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, displaying the elongated black deck and red wheels, with trucks visible beneath.
description_view_3: End-on view showing the width of the deck, the two front red wheels, and the metal truck assembly beneath the nose.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small and hard, solid red, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard metal trucks, silver color, top-mount, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no pattern, graphics, or text
